start1.wav: Be careful, and try not to break your little toy today.
start2.wav: Radio on. Please return this aircraft in one piece.
start3.wav: Ready to fly. Every takeoff is optional. Every landing is not.
start4.wav: Powered up. Flying isn't dangerous. Crashing is.
stop1.wav: Powering down. Gather your puzzle pieces. A little glue heals everything.
stop2.wav: Shutting down. It's not a crash, it's a kit again.
stop3.wav: Goodbye. Foam and glue, good as new.
stop4.wav: Battery low, ego intact. Time to pack up.
